name: Bank of Jinzhou Co., Ltd.
summary: Bank of Jinzhou Co., Ltd. provides various banking products and services in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Corporate Banking Business, Retail Banking Business, and Treasury Business segments. Its Corporate Banking Business segment provides deposits, loans, settlement and clearing, and other products and services. The company's Retail Banking Business segment offers deposits, bank and credit cards, personal and collateral loans, and personal wealth management services. Its Treasury Business segment provides money market placements, investments and repurchasing, and foreign exchange transactions services. The company also provides advances, payment and settlement, finance leasing, and other banking services. As of December 31, 2020, it operated through a network of 15 branches, 194 sub-branches, 6 mini/community sub-branches, and 1 specialized institution located primarily in Beijing, Tianjin, Harbin, and Liaoning. The company was formerly known as Jinzhou City Commercial Bank Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Bank of Jinzhou Co., Ltd. in December 2015. Bank of Jinzhou Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Jinzhou, the People's Republic of China.
